name: Quick Image Gallery
description: Browse and preview images from a folder with keyboard navigation

args.css: .thumbnail { transition: all 0.2s; border: 2px solid transparent; } .thumbnail:hover { border-color: #6366f1; } .thumbnail.active { border-color: #6366f1; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(99,102,241,0.3); }
